events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Lionel
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 77th birthday to the one and only Lionel Richie! Still got us dancing all night long.

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: The iconic Cyndi Lauper celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the incredible Cyndi Lauper! Still a true original and an absolute pop icon.

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering George Michael, who would have celebrated his 63rd birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering George Michael
angles.copy: Today, we're thinking of the incomparable George Michael, who would have been 63. His music lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's death
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the passing of the King of Pop, Michael Jackson.

angles.name: King of Pop Tribute
angles.copy: 17 years ago today, we lost the King of Pop. Michael Jackson's legacy continues to inspire generations.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ringo
angles.copy: Sending peace and love to Ringo Starr on his 86th birthday! What's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Brian May
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Mick Jagger
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Wishing a very happy 83rd birthday to the rock 'n' roll legend, Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched with its first video, 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles.

angles.name: MTV's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 45th to MTV! It all started with The Buggles and changed music forever. What was your first favourite music video?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 22 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. What's your top track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. A truly iconic moment in history.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Remembering Elvis
angles.copy: 49 years today since we lost a legend. The King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley, forever in our hearts.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur.

angles.name: Tupac Tribute
angles.copy: 30 years ago today, the world lost a voice that redefined hip-hop. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his enduring legacy.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: 56 years since the world lost a true guitar visionary. Jimi Hendrix's influence is still felt across music today.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us the masterpiece that is 'Abbey Road'. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Chrissie Hynde
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 75th birthday to the rock legend, Chrissie Hynde! An undeniable force in music.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Liam Gallagher
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock 'n' roll swagger.

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single on this day in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine', a song that continues to resonate globally. What does it mean to you?

events.title: Apple launched the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: On this day in 2001, Apple unveiled the original iPod, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple introduced the iPod and put '1,000 songs in your pocket'. Did you have one of the originals?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Celebrating James Bond Day, marking the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Happy Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic themes to unforgettable gadgets, what's your favourite 007 moment?
